name: ecai-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for ECAI (the European Conference on Artificial Intelligence, governed by EurAI): routing broad/symbolic and applied AI among the general-AI flagships, the abstract-then-full-paper two-deadline flow, double-blind EasyChair-style submission with a summary-reject phase and single-round rebuttal, the IOS Press Frontiers in Artificial Intelligence and Applications (FAIA) open-access proceedings and ecai.cls template, the co-located PAIS (Prestigious Applications of Intelligent Systems) track, and the joint IJCAI-ECAI 2026 cycle in Bremen. Grounded in the IJCAI-ECAI 2026, ECAI 2024/2023 calls, IOS Press FAIA volumes, eurai.org, and dblp checked on 2026-07-09.
